data.title: Bitcoin Could Rip by 137% in a ‘Perfect Scenario,’ According to Analyst Benjamin Cowen – Here’s His Outlook
data.description:

data.title: Pompliano Warns Trump Firing Fed Chair Would Set Dangerous Precedent
data.description:
Anthony Pompliano has spoken out against Trump’s recent threat to fire Jerome Powell, warning that such a move would undermine the institutional independence of the Fed.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/pompliano-warns-trump-firing-fed-chair-would-set-dangerous-precedent/

data.title: Fraudulent Video Claims Li Ka-shing's Cryptocurrency Success
data.description:
According to PANews, a report from TVB has revealed that fraudsters are falsely claiming that Li Ka-shing, the founder of CK Hutchison Holdings, shared his cryptocurrency trading success on a TVB news program. The video, which includes links to a fraudulent website, has been confirmed as fake, and authorities have been notified.

TVB clarified that the deceptive video alleges Li Ka-shing doubled his wealth through a cryptocurrency platform. However, the report is unfounded, and the website involved is a scam. The public is urged to remain vigilant and verify information from unknown sources.

data.title: KiloEx: Will jointly release a review of the incident with SlowMist, thanks CZ and Binance for their emergency assistance in responding to the hacker attack
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, KiloEx issued a statement saying that it will work with the SlowMist team to issue a post-event summary and disclose more details and subsequent security plans. Thanks again to CZ, Binance, and BNB Chain for helping KiloEx establish the initial emergency response command center and contacting security companies and partners to jointly handle this incident.

data.title: Brazilian court jails three men for $190 million crypto Ponzi scheme
data.description:
A Brazilian court has jailed three men for their involvement in a cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme where they stole about $190 million. According to reports, the Brazilian court slammed a combined jail term of 170 years on the three men, underscoring the severity of the case. The men were accused of being the brains behind the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/brazilian-court-jails-three-men-crypto-ponzi/

data.title: Strategy’s Bitcoin Holdings Outperform Nvidia Stock, MSTR Stock Soars 2,500%
data.description:
Known by its ticker MSTR stock, the company’s bold decision to adopt Bitcoin as its treasury reserve asset back in 2020 has fueled an astonishing 2,500% stock surge. Even Bitcoin itself has risen 614% …
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/strategys-bitcoin-holdings-outperform-nvidia-stock-mstr-stock-soars-2500/

data.title: Binance requires Indian users to re-do KYC verification to meet anti-money laundering regulations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance requires new and old users in India to re-perform identity verification (KYC) to meet anti-money laundering (AML) regulations.

data.title: XRP Consolidation About To Reach A Bottom, Wave 5 Says $5.85 Is Coming
data.description:
XRP is still in consolidation mode after hitting a new seven-year high in January 2025. This consolidation has seen the price drop slowly, but steadily, losing around 40% of its value since then. Currently, bulls seem to have created support for the altcoin at $2, as this level continues to hold even through crashes. Thus, it has created the expectation that the bottom could be close for the XRP price, and this could serve as a bounce-off point
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-consolidation-wave-5-5-85/
